treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient's condition progressively worsened, died on day 31 of life of sepsis with diffuse, uncontrolled, cutaneous and mucosal bleeding, and multi-organ failure

treatment_information.specific_treatment: Fresh-frozen plasma, packed red cells, platelets, coagulation factors, diuretics, pressors, and parenteral feeding
treatment_information.treatment_response: Stabilized patient's condition, no sepsis presented

treatment_timeline.event: First child died of sepsis with diffuse, uncontrolled, cutaneous and mucosal bleeding, and multi-organ failure
Liver biopsy performed on second child, proved advanced cirrhosis with cholestasis and highly elevated concentrations of iron in the liver tissue
Second child's clinical conditions began to progressively improve

patient_outcome.final_status: First child deceased, second child alive and well
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Second child's parents refused control liver biopsy
patient_outcome.complications: First child had sepsis with diffuse, uncontrolled, cutaneous and mucosal bleeding, and multi-organ failure; second child had no complications mentioned
patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: Second child's conditions began to improve as of the first month of life
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Second child is well, and biochemical and hematological testing show no signs of liver failure
